name: jenkins-tools-cli
description: Interactive Jenkins CLI tool with step-by-step build configuration

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const d=p.resolve('dist');if(fs.existsSync(d))fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true})" && tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');function c(s,d){if(!fs.existsSync(d))fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(s)){const sp=p.join(s,f),dp=p.join(d,f);fs.statSync(sp).isDirectory()?c(sp,dp):fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp)}}c(p.resolve('src/skills'),p.resolve('dist/skills'))"
